headline: Paychex (PAYX) Could Be 38% Below Fair Value After Russell Growth Index Removal
summary: Paychex (PAYX) was recently removed from several Russell growth indices, including the Russell 1000 Growth and Russell Midcap Growth benchmarks, an index reshuffle that can alter how some institutional investors access the stock. See our latest analysis for Paychex. At a share price of $106.26, Paychex has faced a weak year-to-date share price return and a 1 year total shareholder return that is down 23.87%, even though the 90 day share price return of 24.18% suggests some recent momentum,...
